function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_uart_loopback.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_uart_loopback
description: >
  Verifies all four UART instances (UART0–UART3) of mspm33c321a_derivative
  using external UART BFM models in loopback configuration at 115200 baud.
  Each instance transmits a known byte and the corresponding receive model
  returns it; the test confirms end-to-end data integrity for every instance.
checklist_ids:
  - UART-01
  - UART-02
  - UART-03
  - UART-04
test_names:
  - test_uart0_loopback_115200
  - test_uart1_loopback_115200
  - test_uart2_loopback_115200
  - test_uart3_loopback_115200
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: uart_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart0_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart0_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none
  - name: uart1_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart1_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart1_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none
  - name: uart2_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart2_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart2_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none
  - name: uart3_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart3_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart3_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; all UARTs are in idle state
  - step: 2
    action: apb_configure_uart
    instance: UART0
    baud_rate: 115200
    data_bits: 8
    stop_bits: 1
    parity: none
    description: Configure UART0 baud rate and frame format
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write_uart_tx
    instance: UART0
    data: 0xA5
    description: Write 0xA5 to UART0 TX FIFO
  - step: 4
    action: uart_model_receive
    device: uart_model
    expected_byte: 0xA5
    description: uart_model captures transmitted byte from UART0 TX
  - step: 5
    action: uart_model_send
    device: uart_model
    data: 0x5A
    description: uart_model sends 0x5A to UART0 RX
  - step: 6
    action: apb_read_uart_rx
    instance: UART0
    expected: 0x5A
    description: Read UART0 RX FIFO; verify received byte is 0x5A
  - step: 7
    action: repeat_steps
    steps: [2, 3, 4, 5, 6]
    instances: [UART1, UART2, UART3]
    devices: [uart1_model, uart2_model, uart3_model]
    tx_byte: 0xB6
    rx_byte: 0x49
    description: Repeat loopback test for UART1, UART2, UART3

checks:
  - id: CHK-UART-01
    checklist_id: UART-01
    description: UART0 transmitted 0xA5 received by model; model reply 0x5A received by UART0
    expected: TX byte == 0xA5 at model; RX FIFO == 0x5A
  - id: CHK-UART-02
    checklist_id: UART-02
    description: UART1 loopback data integrity verified
    expected: TX and RX bytes match at both ends
  - id: CHK-UART-03
    checklist_id: UART-03
    description: UART2 loopback data integrity verified
    expected: TX and RX bytes match at both ends
  - id: CHK-UART-04
    checklist_id: UART-04
    description: UART3 loopback data integrity verified
    expected: TX and RX bytes match at both ends

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-UART checks PASS
  - No framing, overrun, or parity errors detected
  - All UART models report clean transactions
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

args.file_text:
scenario_name: scenario_uart_loopback
description: >
  Verifies all four UART instances (UART0–UART3) of mspm33c321a_derivative
  using external UART BFM models in loopback configuration at 115200 baud.
  Each instance transmits a known byte and the corresponding receive model
  returns it; the test confirms end-to-end data integrity for every instance.
checklist_ids:
  - UART-01
  - UART-02
  - UART-03
  - UART-04
test_names:
  - test_uart0_loopback_115200
  - test_uart1_loopback_115200
  - test_uart2_loopback_115200
  - test_uart3_loopback_115200
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: uart_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart0_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart0_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none
  - name: uart1_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart1_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart1_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none
  - name: uart2_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart2_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart2_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none
  - name: uart3_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart3_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart3_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; all UARTs are in idle state
  - step: 2
    action: apb_configure_uart
    instance: UART0
    baud_rate: 115200
    data_bits: 8
    stop_bits: 1
    parity: none
    description: Configure UART0 baud rate and frame format
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write_uart_tx
    instance: UART0
    data: 0xA5
    description: Write 0xA5 to UART0 TX FIFO
  - step: 4
    action: uart_model_receive
    device: uart_model
    expected_byte: 0xA5
    description: uart_model captures transmitted byte from UART0 TX
  - step: 5
    action: uart_model_send
    device: uart_model
    data: 0x5A
    description: uart_model sends 0x5A to UART0 RX
  - step: 6
    action: apb_read_uart_rx
    instance: UART0
    expected: 0x5A
    description: Read UART0 RX FIFO; verify received byte is 0x5A
  - step: 7
    action: repeat_steps
    steps: [2, 3, 4, 5, 6]
    instances: [UART1, UART2, UART3]
    devices: [uart1_model, uart2_model, uart3_model]
    tx_byte: 0xB6
    rx_byte: 0x49
    description: Repeat loopback test for UART1, UART2, UART3

checks:
  - id: CHK-UART-01
    checklist_id: UART-01
    description: UART0 transmitted 0xA5 received by model; model reply 0x5A received by UART0
    expected: TX byte == 0xA5 at model; RX FIFO == 0x5A
  - id: CHK-UART-02
    checklist_id: UART-02
    description: UART1 loopback data integrity verified
    expected: TX and RX bytes match at both ends
  - id: CHK-UART-03
    checklist_id: UART-03
    description: UART2 loopback data integrity verified
    expected: TX and RX bytes match at both ends
  - id: CHK-UART-04
    checklist_id: UART-04
    description: UART3 loopback data integrity verified
    expected: TX and RX bytes match at both ends

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-UART checks PASS
  - No framing, overrun, or parity errors detected
  - All UART models report clean transactions
